libraries.title: Libraries
libraries.description: Manage your audiobook and ebook libraries

audiobookLibrary.label: Audiobook Library
audiobookLibrary.description: The folder where your audiobooks are stored

toast.updateError: Failed to update audiobook library path
toast.removeError: Failed to remove audiobook library path

ebookLibrary.label: Ebook Library
ebookLibrary.description: The folder where your ebooks are stored

toast.updateError: Failed to update ebook library path
toast.removeError: Failed to remove ebook library path

opds.label: OPDS Feed
opds.description: OPDS (Open Publication Distribution System) allows e-reader apps like KOReader, Moon+ Reader, and Calibre to browse and download ebooks directly from your library. To connect, enter any username (e.g., your email) and use your API token as the password when configuring the OPDS feed in your reader app.
opds.authHint: Use any username and your API token as the password to authenticate.

folderPicker.title: Select Library Folder
folderPicker.description: Choose the folder for your library
folderPicker.audiobookDescription: Choose the folder where your audiobooks are stored
folderPicker.ebookDescription: Choose the folder where your ebooks are stored

metadataPriority.title: Metadata Priority
metadataPriority.description: Configure the priority order for each metadata field. Higher items take precedence when data is available from multiple sources.

createDialog.title: Create User
createDialog.description: Add a new user to the system
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.passwordHint: User will use this to log in initially

banDialog.title: Ban User
banDialog.description: This will prevent the user from logging in

deleteDialog.title: Delete User
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Configure how users can access your audiobook vault

signups.label: Allow Sign-ups
signups.description: When disabled, only existing users can sign in

error.loadFailed: Failed to load settings. Please try again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services for metadata and enrichment

hardcover.title: Hardcover
hardcover.description: Connect to Hardcover to fetch book metadata, ratings, and cover art

autoSync.label: Auto-sync on import
autoSync.description: Automatically fetch metadata from Hardcover when new audiobooks are imported

restore.title: Restore from AudioBookShelf
restore.description: Import your library and data from an AudioBookShelf backup

wizard.title: Restore from AudioBookShelf
wizard.description: Follow the steps below to import your AudioBookShelf library

upload.title: Upload Backup
upload.description: Upload your AudioBookShelf backup file to begin the restore process

prerequisites.title: Before You Begin
prerequisites.description: Please ensure you have completed the following steps before starting the restore process.

backup.title: Create an AudioBookShelf backup
backup.description: In AudioBookShelf, go to Settings → Backups and create a new backup. Download the .audiobookshelf backup file to your computer.

files.title: Ensure your audiobook files are accessible
files.description: Your audiobook files must be accessible from this server at the same paths (or you'll need to map the paths during import). SAV reads audio files directly from disk.

users.title: Create user accounts in SAV
users.description: If you want to import listening progress, the users must already exist in SAV. Create any needed user accounts before starting the restore.

diskSpace.title: Ensure sufficient disk space
diskSpace.description: The backup file will be temporarily extracted. Ensure you have enough disk space for the backup file plus extraction (roughly 2x the backup size).

checklist.title: Quick Checklist
checklist.item1: I have created and downloaded an AudioBookShelf .audiobookshelf backup file
checklist.item2: My audiobook files are accessible from this server
checklist.item3: I have created user accounts for progress import (if needed)

upload.dropzoneTitle: Drop your backup file here or click to browse
upload.dropzoneDescription: Select an .audiobookshelf backup file from AudioBookShelf
upload.infoPoint1: This wizard will guide you through restoring your AudioBookShelf data
upload.infoPoint2: The backup file must be an .audiobookshelf export from AudioBookShelf
upload.infoPoint3: Existing audiobooks can be preserved or overwritten

errors.invalidFileType: Please select a valid .audiobookshelf backup file
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}

library.title: Select Library
library.description: Choose which AudioBookShelf library to restore
library.infoPoint1: Select the AudioBookShelf library you want to import
library.infoPoint2: Only one library can be imported at a time
library.infoPoint3: All folders within the selected library will be imported

errors.noSession: No session found. Please upload a backup file first.
errors.noLibrariesDescription: The uploaded backup file does not contain any libraries. Please upload a valid AudioBookShelf backup.

paths.title: Configure Paths
paths.description: Map the AudioBookShelf library path to your Simple Audiobook Vault path
paths.absPathDescription: This is where your audiobooks were stored in AudioBookShelf
paths.savPathDescription: Enter where your audiobooks are currently stored on this system
paths.infoPoint1: The AudioBookShelf path will be replaced with the SAV path in all database records
paths.infoPoint2: Make sure your audiobooks are accessible at the new path
paths.infoPoint3: File and folder structure should be the same as in AudioBookShelf

errors.noSession: No session found. Please upload a backup file first.
errors.noLibrarySelectedDescription: Please go back and select a library to restore.

users.title: Map Users
users.description: Map AudioBookShelf users to Simple Audiobook Vault users to import listening progress
users.skipWarning: Progress for this user will not be imported
users.unmappedWarning: Some users with progress are not mapped. Their listening progress will not be imported.
users.noUsersFound: No users found in backup with listening progress

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load session or users

options.title: Import Options
options.description: Choose what data to import from your AudioBookShelf backup

importProgress.label: Import listening progress
importProgress.description: Import user playback positions and completion status for mapped users. This includes current position, finished books, and bookmarks.

importCovers.label: Import audiobook covers
importCovers.description: Copy cover images from the AudioBookShelf backup to your Simple Audiobook Vault library. Covers will be stored in the app data folder.

importAuthorImages.label: Import author images
importAuthorImages.description: Copy author and narrator profile images from the AudioBookShelf backup. These will be stored in the app data folder.

overwriteExisting.label: Overwrite existing audiobooks
overwriteExisting.description: Replace metadata for audiobooks that already exist in your library (matched by file path). This will overwrite titles, descriptions, covers, and other metadata.

options.overwriteWarning: Existing audiobook metadata and covers will be replaced with data from the AudioBookShelf backup. This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have a backup of your current data if needed.

preview.title: Import Preview
preview.description: Review what will be imported from your AudioBookShelf backup

import.title: Importing Data
import.description: Please do not close this page. The import is in progress.
import.descriptionComplete: Your AudioBookShelf data has been successfully imported!
import.descriptionFailed: The import failed and all changes have been rolled back.
import.completedDescription: Your AudioBookShelf data has been successfully imported. Redirecting to your library...
import.rolledBackDescription: The import was cancelled or failed, and all changes have been rolled back. No data was modified.
